description: Open the rocket design at /home/ga/Documents/rockets/hammerhead_base.ork and convert it into a 'hammerhead' configuration to carry an oversized payload. Modify the design by adding a transition component, a payload bay body tube (minimum 50mm diameter and 100mm length), and a nose cone. Include a 50g mass component inside the payload bay. Adjust the fins on the lower booster section to ensure a stability margin of at least 1.0 calibers. Verify the flight performance through simulation. Save the modified design to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/hammerhead_rocket.ork and write a retrofit report to /home/ga/Documents/exports/hammerhead_report.txt documenting the payload bay dimensions, the 50g mass, the final stability margin, and the simulated peak altitude.
